levels.body: The belfry is located in the steeple of a church. It is the floor or room of the tower that contains the church bells (cf. "belfry, *n*." 4.b.). For more information on the steeple, see here.
worksCited: "belfry, *n*." *OED Online*, Oxford University Press, March 2021, www.oed.com/view/Entry/17358. Accessed 31 May 2021.
